description: Standard planned events from the Bloomreach engagement data model. Each entry describes a canonical event the platform tracks, with its recommended flag and tracking status.

events.name: cart_update
events.description: Items added, removed and/or updated to the e-commerce cart

events.name: checkout
events.description: Steps between cart updates and the actual purchase event(s)

events.name: consent
events.description: Event that provides proof of the customer's preferences regarding data collection and campaign communications

events.name: double_opt_in
events.description: Secondary consent; can be tied to a purchase event

events.name: purchase_item
events.description: Purchase details broken down into individual items from the transaction/sale

events.name: view_item
events.description: Custom page visit event for product details interest

events.name: view_category
events.description: Custom page visit event for product category interest

events.name: page_visit
events.description: Every page load fires this event
